siteInfo.name: Galaxy Beauty Academy
siteInfo.tagline: Beauty Academy Chennai | Start Your Beauty Career | Free Counselling
siteInfo.description: Tamil Nadu's premier institute for Makeup, Hair, Skin Care, Nail Art & Cosmetology. Expert trainers, global certification & placement support.

founder.name: Saro
founder.title: Founder & Lead Trainer
founder.description: I am a Chennai-based professional fashion makeup artist and educator, and the founder of Galaxy Beauty Academy & Salon. Recognized as one of Tamil Nadu's early established fashion makeup artists, I am also an internationally published professional.

courses.title: Professional Makeup Artistry
courses.description: Learn bridal, editorial, and professional makeup techniques with hands-on training.

courses.title: Hair Styling & Extensions
courses.description: Master hair cutting, coloring, styling, and professional extensions.

courses.title: Skin Care & Aesthetics
courses.description: Professional skincare, facials, and aesthetic treatments.

courses.title: Nail Art & Extensions
courses.description: Creative nail art, extensions, and professional nail care.

courses.title: Cosmetology
courses.description: Comprehensive cosmetology program covering all beauty aspects.

courses.title: Salon Management
courses.description: Learn to manage and run a successful beauty salon.
